meta.title: S1 E8: This Week In Spaceflight History - Zond 4
meta.description:
Today’s mission: Zond-4 - which launched on March 2nd, 1968 from Baikonur Cosmodrome. This mission is actually really cool and I didn’t know anything about it until today, so let’s see what Zond-4 is on today’s episode of “This week in spaceflight history”

(sorry for the quiet audio, we'll get it dialed in next time)

Make sure and tune in LIVE each Wednesday night at 9:00 Central (3 UTC) at twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Follow me on Instagram for fun, funny and factual photos - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut

All music is original music by Tim Dodd (Everyday Astronaut)
